purpose: Official public source coverage matrix for nationwide Korean festival research from 2016 to 2026.

matrix.source: Public Data Portal nationwide culture festival standard data
Korea Tourism DataLab culture-tourism festival analysis
limitations: admin-dong proxy is not ticket gate count

matrix.years_covered: 2012 fiscal year onward; usable for 2016+; 2026 unavailable until later disclosure
matrix.access_mode: public web/data.go.kr metadata; API may require key
limitations: large-event threshold: metro 500m KRW, basic local gov 300m KRW

matrix.source: PPS NaraJangteo contract information and process disclosure
matrix.years_covered: metadata says 2004-07 to 2025-01; verify 2026 before ingest
matrix.access_mode: public metadata/web search; automated API usually service-key gated

coverage_gap_2016: Current MCST nationwide annual regional-festival page exposes 2017-2026 only. The official 2016 MCST item found is a culture-tourism-festival evaluation report covering 43 selected festivals, not all nationwide festivals. KTO DataLab visible festival-year choices start at 2018 and skip 2016.
recommendation: Use MCST annual downloads as 2017-2026 master backbone, Public Data Portal for current geocoding, DataLab and MCST evaluation as performance overlays, Local Finance 365 for large-event cost disclosure, and NaraJangteo as a fuzzy/high-confidence contract-matching layer.
